titles.en: Chapter on the Separation That Concludes a Sale, Whether it is by Physical Departure or Verbal Agreement
Chapter on the Separation That Concludes a Sale, Whether it is by Physical Departure or Verbal Agreement

segments: : "إِنَّ أَبِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اِشْتَرَى أَرْضاً يُقَالُ لَهَا اَلْعُرَيْضُ فَلَمَّا اِسْتَوْجَبَهَا قَامَ فَمَضَى فَقُلْتُ لَهُ يَا أَبَةِ عَجَّلْتَ بِالْقِيَامِ فَقَالَ "يَا بُنَيَّ إِنِّي أَرَدْتُ أَنْ يَجِبَ اَلْبَيْعُ" ".
arabic.text: : "إِنَّ أَبِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اِشْتَرَى أَرْضاً يُقَالُ لَهَا اَلْعُرَيْضُ فَلَمَّا اِسْتَوْجَبَهَا قَامَ فَمَضَى فَقُلْتُ لَهُ يَا أَبَةِ عَجَّلْتَ بِالْقِيَامِ فَقَالَ "يَا بُنَيَّ إِنِّي أَرَدْتُ أَنْ يَجِبَ اَلْبَيْعُ" ".

segments:
Hadith.3768 - It is narrated from Al-Halabi, from Abu Abdillah (as), that he said:
"My father (as) purchased a piece of land called Al-Urayd. When he finalized the purchase, he immediately stood up and left.
Imam Al Sadiq (as) said to Imam Al Baqir (as): 'O father, you left in haste.'
Imam Al Baqir (as) replied: 'O my son, I wanted the sale to become binding.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3768 - It is narrated from Al-Halabi, from Abu Abdillah (as), that he said:
"My father (as) purchased a piece of land called Al-Urayd. When he finalized the purchase, he immediately stood up and left.
Imam Al Sadiq (as) said to Imam Al Baqir (as): 'O father, you left in haste.'
Imam Al Baqir (as) replied: 'O my son, I wanted the sale to become binding.'"

narratorChain.raw: 3768 - رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ

titles.en: Chapter on the Separation That Concludes a Sale, Whether it is by Physical Departure or Verbal Agreement

segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ : "اِبْتَعْتُ أَرْضاً فَلَمَّا اِسْتَوْجَبْتُهَا قُمْتُ فَمَشَيْتُ خُطًا ثُمَّ رَجَعْتُ أَرَدْتُ أَنْ يَجِبَ اَلْبَيْعُ حِينَ اَلاِفْتِرَاقِ".
arabic.text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ : "اِبْتَعْتُ أَرْضاً فَلَمَّا اِسْتَوْجَبْتُهَا قُمْتُ فَمَشَيْتُ خُطًا ثُمَّ رَجَعْتُ أَرَدْتُ أَنْ يَجِبَ اَلْبَيْعُ حِينَ اَلاِفْتِرَاقِ".

segments:
Hadith.3769 - Abu Ayyub narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim who said: I heard Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) say:
"I purchased a piece of land, and when I finalized the purchase, I stood up and walked a few steps, then returned. I did this to make the sale binding at the time of separation."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.3769 - Abu Ayyub narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim who said: I heard Abu Ja'far Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) say:
"I purchased a piece of land, and when I finalized the purchase, I stood up and walked a few steps, then returned. I did this to make the sale binding at the time of separation."

narratorChain.raw: وَ رَوَى أَبُو أَيُّوبَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ
